blocks.content: In this step of your journey, you add the Infinity data source and give it a name.
To add the Infinity data source, complete the following steps:
In Grafana Cloud, click **Connections > Data sources**.
Search for `Infinity` and click the tile.

blocks.reftarget: [data-testid='data-testid Data source settings page name input field']
blocks.content: Enter a name for the data source.

The name of the data source is displayed on the dashboard panels, so it's important to choose a meaningful name. If there are multiple data sources for a dashboard panel, the default toggle determines which data source appears by default.
In the next step of your journey, you'll add basic authentication.

---

### More to explore (optional)

At this point in your journey, you can explore the following paths:

- [Data source plugins for Grafana](https://grafana.com/grafana/plugins/data-source-plugins/)
